title: After the Thin Man
writer: Frances Goodrich, Albert Hackett, Dashiell Hammett
actors: William Powell, Myrna Loy, James Stewart
plot: Private detective Nick Charles and his wealthy wife Nora are back home at last and hoping for a quiet New Year when there is a murder. The obvious suspect is his wife, Nora's cousin, Selma.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 4 wins & 1 nomination total
